display_information.name: Casey Support Assistant
display_information.description: Help employees file and track support requests

slash_commands.description: File or check a support request

securelore_declared_features: Create support ticket drafts after user confirmation
Show support request status in App Home

securelore_ai_disclosure.model: OpenAI or Anthropic model configured by workspace admin
securelore_ai_disclosure.retention: Prompts and responses are retained for 30 days for support debugging unless disabled by an admin.
securelore_ai_disclosure.training_use: Slack customer data is not used to train foundation models.
